{/* Header - Dynamic & Young */}

Salut, L├®o ! ­ƒæï

3├¿me Scientifique A

{new Date().toLocaleDateString('fr-FR', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'short' })}

{/* Time Column */}
{slot.time}

{slot.time} ÔÇó {slot.duration}

{slot.subject}

{!isBreak && } {slot.room}

); })}
); }
